title: Rustic Delight
description: An add-on for Farmer's Delight that adds Pancakes, Cotton, Coffee, Bell Peppers, fried foods and more!
body:
## About **Rustic Delight** is an add-on for Farmer's Delight, adding new crops, blocks and food items that stay true to the original mod and vanilla Minecraft. Each feature is configurable, so feel free to tweak it to suit your needs! [Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/zHYkT85E6p) **to stay ahead with the latest updates and get exclusive sneak peeks!** 🫑 Got ideas or found a bug? Share your feedback and help shape the future of **Rustic Delight**!
![Pancakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cbbb2483353f71ebf702cae0c37b6675f9cdcb3.png) _Pancakes are a great way to make your home more cozy. Eat up to six servings for some extra energy.
Which flavor would you pick: **Chocolate** or **Honey**?_
## Features ### 🥞 Pancakes Cozy up your home by making your own Pancakes! All you need are the new **Batter** and **Syrup** ingredients. Similar to pies and cake, pancakes can be placed **decoratively** as a block in your world. Right-click to eat a single pancake directly from the stack, or use a knife to take one with you! _Pancakes are available in **different flavors**, each granting different **bonus effects**: Classic, Honey, cherry blossom, chocolate, pumpkin and the healthy vegetable variant._
### ☕ Coffee Brew your own coffee with different flavors and effects. Coffee is a great way to feel more energized, making you move, dig and attack faster than normal (granting the **Speed** and **Haste** effects). _Want to feel even more energized? Craft **Golden Coffee Beans** to brew some Haste potions._
### 🫑 Bell Peppers Make your farms more colorful by growing your own sweet bell peppers! Use them in all-new cooking recipes, like the **Stuffed Bell Pepper** and **Bell Pepper Pasta**. Save some ingredients by cutting them into slices. Available in Red, Yellow and Green. _**Hot tip:** Explore the Jungle to find yourself some Wild Bell Peppers and Wild Coffee._
### 🌼 Cotton Ever wish to obtain lots of String without needing a spider farm? You're in luck! Look for Wild Cotton in the forest and set up a farm! Use it to craft String, Paper or Canvas. _**Time to fry some foods!** Turn your **Cotton Seeds** into **Cooking Oil** using the Cooking Pot. Use it to cook various fried dishes, like Spring Rolls, Fruit Beignet and Fried Chicken._
### 🦑 Calamari Squids and Glow Squids now drop **Calamari**! Cook it, slice it, and make some **Fried Calamari**! For the sushi lovers, you can even make a delicious **Calamari Roll**, and treat yourself to a luxurious new feast: **Rice Roll Royale**.
## Compatibility ### 🍻 Brewin' and Chewin' Place Rustic Delight's foods in your world, on a Coaster! ### 🍯 Botany Pots ### 🌸 Serene Seasons ### 💧 Thirst Was Taken
## My other mods The pancakes from this mod are also available as a standalone mod, Rustic Pancakes!


## Support If you like my mod and want to support me on my Minecraft modding journey, please consider ☕ buying me a coffee!
